task.title: Add Email Templates for Notifications
task.description: Create email templates for the notification system. Templates should be in templates/emails/notifications/ directory.
constraints: Only create files in templates/emails/notifications/ directory
Do not modify files outside this directory

steps.thought: I'll create email templates for different notification types within this directory.

arguments.content:
{% extends "templates/emails/notifications/base.html" %} {% block content %}

Welcome to {{ site_name }}!

Hi {{ user.first_name }},

Thank you for joining {{ site_name }}. We're excited to have you on board!

Get started by:

  • Completing your profile
  • Exploring our features
  • Connecting with other users

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our support team.

{% endblock %}

steps.thought: Now I'll create a password reset notification template.

arguments.content:
{% extends "templates/emails/notifications/base.html" %} {% block content %}

Password Reset Request

Hi {{ user.first_name }},

We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new password:

Reset Password

This link will expire in 24 hours.

If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

{% endblock %}

Order Confirmation

Hi {{ user.first_name }},

Thank you for your order! Your order #{{ order.id }} has been confirmed.

Order Details

{% for item in order.items %} {% endfor %}
Item Quantity Price
{{ item.name }} {{ item.quantity }} ${{ item.price }}
Total: ${{ order.total }}

We'll send you another email when your order ships.

{% endblock %}

steps.thought: Let me create a generic notification template and a configuration documentation file.
Let me create a README documenting these templates and their usage.

arguments.content:
# Email Notification Templates

This directory contains email templates for the notification system.

## Available Templates

### welcome.html
Sent when a new user registers.

**Context variables:**
- `site_name`: Name of the site
- `user.first_name`: User's first name

### password_reset.html
Sent when a user requests a password reset.

**Context variables:**
- `user.first_name`: User's first name
- `reset_url`: Password reset URL

### order_confirmation.html
Sent when an order is confirmed.

**Context variables:**
- `user.first_name`: User's first name
- `order.id`: Order ID
- `order.items`: List of order items
- `order.total`: Order total

### notification_sent.html
Generic template for various notifications.

**Context variables:**
- `user.first_name`: User's first name
- `notification_type`: Type of notification
- `notification_message`: Notification message
- `site_url`: Base URL of the site

## Usage

```python
from django.core.mail import send_mail
from django.template.loader import render_to_string

html_message = render_to_string(
    'templates/emails/notifications/welcome.html',
    {'user': user, 'site_name': 'My Site'}
)

send_mail(
    subject='Welcome!',
    message='',
    from_email='noreply@example.com',
    recipient_list=[user.email],
    html_message=html_message
)
```

## Email Configuration

Ensure the following settings are configured in your Django settings:

```python
EMAIL_HOST = 'smtp.gmail.com'
EMAIL_PORT = 587
EMAIL_USE_TLS = True
EMAIL_HOST_USER = 'your-email@gmail.com'
EMAIL_HOST_PASSWORD = 'your-app-password'
DEFAULT_FROM_EMAIL = 'noreply@example.com'
```
